docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $420.00 FILED BY SUN CHANG GAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN DAVID ET AL OWNER OF SAGAN S CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
